Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_001_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 1 0 0}We've got the initiative! They don't seem very strong.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_002_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 2 0 0}This is our chance to strike first! Go for it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_003_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 3 0 0}The enemy's strong, but we get to go first![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_004_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 4 0 0}It's our chance to go first! Two enemies... You can take them![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_005_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 5 0 0}Two enemies... We have the chance to hit first![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_006_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 6 0 0}Two enemies. They're tough, but we're going first![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_007_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 7 0 0}Three targets! They won't know what hit them![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_008_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 8 0 0}Three enemies detected. We've got the upper hand![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_009_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 9 0 0}Three powerful enemies! We have a chance to strike first![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_010_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 10 0 0}Four enemies, and we've got the advantage! Don't hold anything back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_011_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 11 0 0}Four targets! This is our chance to attack first![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_012_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 12 0 0}Four targets. We have the first move, but they're tough![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_013_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 13 0 0}We took the initiative! It's a group of five, but you'll be okay![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_014_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 14 0 0}Five enemies. Here's our chance to attack first![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_015_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 15 0 0}Five powerful enemies...! Let's thin their numbers while we have the advantage![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_016_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 16 0 0}The enemy has the initiative, but they're nothing to be afraid of.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_017_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 17 0 0}Enemy attack! Just hold on for now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_018_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 18 0 0}Enemy attack! Be careful, it's a tough one![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_019_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 19 0 0}Two-enemy ambush! You can take them, just stay calm![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_021_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 21 0 0}Two powerful foes. They have the upper hand! You have to hold on![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_022_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 22 0 0}Three targets! They got the jump on you, but you can turn this around![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_024_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 24 0 0}Three strong enemies... It's an ambush! Brace yourselves![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_025_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 25 0 0}It's a group of four. They're not tough, but they've got the initiative![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_026_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 26 0 0}Four enemies. They've got the upper hand...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_027_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 27 0 0}The enemy's got the advantage! They're four strong... You have to hold out![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_028_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 28 0 0}It's a group of five... But you've got what it takes![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_029_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 29 0 0}Incoming! There's five of them! This doesn't look good![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_030_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 30 0 0}No... It's an ambush! They've got power and numbers... You have to hang in there![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_031_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 31 0 0}One target! This'll be no problem at all![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_033_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 33 0 0}A single enemy detected... It's a strong one![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_037_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 37 0 0}Three targets! They're weak, but don't be careless![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_039_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 39 0 0}There are three enemies... They look tough![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_040_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 40 0 0}Four enemies, but they aren't much of a threat![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_041_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 41 0 0}Four targets! Careful, there's power in numbers![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_042_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 42 0 0}Four powerful enemies! This looks like a difficult fight...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_043_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 43 0 0}Five targets! They're not strong, but that's a lot![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_044_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 44 0 0}Five enemies detected! Stay calm and take them down![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_046_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 48 0 0}I'm detecting a surge of power... Be careful![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_047_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 49 0 0}A rare enemy! It'd be great if we can defeat it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_047_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 50 0 0}That one's special! Take it down if you can![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_047_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 51 0 0}It's a rare Shadow! Do your best to take it down![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_048_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 52 0 0}It's an enemy of the Death Arcana! Please, you've got to get out of there![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_048_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 53 0 0}No, you don't stand a chance... You need to pull back![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_049_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 54 0 0}It's an enemy of the Death Arcana... Let's give it everything we've got![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_049_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 55 0 0}If things look too dangerous, you can always retreat![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_051_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 59 0 0}Looks like that's the boss of this place. I'm sensing a surge of power... Be careful![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_051_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 60 0 0}That's no ordinary Shadow... Keep your guard up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_051_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 61 0 0}It's the guardian of this area. Let's stay focused![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_052_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 62 0 0}Multiple team members are out of commission![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_073_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 83 0 0}You're hurt! Do you have any healing?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_074_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 84 0 0}Oh no! You've got to get up somehow![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_078_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 88 0 0}Sanada-senpai's been knocked down! Are you okay!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_097_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 107 0 0}The enemy retreated! There are three left![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_100_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 110 0 0}The enemy's fallen back! That's it, everyone![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_111_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 121 0 0}Your defense is down. Keep an eye on your health![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_112_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 122 0 0}Yukari-chan, watch out. Your defense has fallen![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_116_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 126 0 0}Aigis, your defense is low right now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_130_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 140 0 0}Your speed's down! That'll impact your accuracy and evasion...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_131_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 141 0 0}Five enemies! Let's not do anything too risky![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_132_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 142 0 0}There's four of them! You can do this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_136_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 146 0 0}You're all worn out... Try for some healing![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_137_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 147 0 0}Leader, your health is low! Be careful![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_138_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 148 0 0}Yukari-chan's in trouble... Do you have a chance to heal?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_139_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 149 0 0}Junpei-kun, are you all right? Keep an eye on your health.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_140_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 150 0 0}Sanada-senpai's in trouble! Someone back him up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_141_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 151 0 0}Kirijo-senpai's health is low...! Someone help her![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_142_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 152 0 0}Aigis has taken serious damage... She needs to recover![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_143_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 153 0 0}Amada-kun, are you okay!? Can someone check on him!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_144_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 154 0 0}Koro-chan's in danger! He needs help fast![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_145_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 155 0 0}Aragaki-senpai's hurt! He needs to be treated![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_146_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 156 0 0}You don't have much health left. Can you heal up?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_147_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 157 0 0}Just hold on until you warm up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_151_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 161 0 0}Kirijo-senpai's frozen! She can't move on her own![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_153_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 163 0 0}Amada-kun's frozen... He can't move like this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_156_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 166 0 0}You're frozen! It's preventing you from moving![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_157_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 167 0 0}Just hold on for now! You'll get out of this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_158_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 168 0 0}Yukari-chan! The electricity is preventing you from moving![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_159_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 169 0 0}It doesn't seem like Junpei-kun can move yet...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_165_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 175 0 0}Aragaki-senpai's shocked. It looks like he still can't move![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_166_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 176 0 0}The electric shock's keeping you from moving![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_168_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 178 0 0}Yukari-chan's been charmed... Can you snap her out of it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_169_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 179 0 0}Junpei-kun's charmed! Come on, snap out of it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_171_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 181 0 0}Kirijo-senpai's been charmed! Is there anything you can do?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_172_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 182 0 0}Aigis is charmed... She can't tell friend from foe...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_173_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 183 0 0}Amada-kun's charmed. Please, come to your senses![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_174_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 184 0 0}Koro-chan! Oh no, he's taking the wrong side![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_176_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 186 0 0}The enemy's charmed you! Please, we're on your side...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_178_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 188 0 0}Yukari-chan's been poisoned... Do you have an antidote?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_179_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 189 0 0}Junpei-kun's poisoned. Watch out for your health![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_180_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 190 0 0}Sanada-senpai, you're poisoned! Keep an eye on your health![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_181_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 191 0 0}Kirijo-senpai's been poisoned... Can someone fix it!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_183_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 193 0 0}Amada-kun's poisoned...! You need to cure him![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_185_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 195 0 0}Aragaki-senpai's been poisoned... Please watch your health![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_186_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 196 0 0}You're poisoned! Keep an eye on your health![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_187_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 197 0 0}You're distressed. Just take a deep breath![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_197_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 207 0 0}Our leader's confused! Someone back him up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_198_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 208 0 0}Yukari-chan's confused! Oh no... She's acting on her own![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_202_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 212 0 0}Aigis is confused! Just try and calm down...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_204_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 214 0 0}Stop, Koro-chan! You need to calm down![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_207_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 217 0 0}Your fear will pass in time. Just stay strong![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_208_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 218 0 0}Yukari-chan, don't let the fear get to you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_209_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 219 0 0}Junpei-kun... Will he be able to fight...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_212_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 222 0 0}Aigis! Is she going to be okay like that...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_216_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 226 0 0}The enemy's striking fear into you... Someone might run![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_218_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 228 0 0}Yukari-chan's angry... Please, come to your senses![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_220_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 230 0 0}Sanada-senpai's getting aggressive! Please, just calm down![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_221_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 231 0 0}Kirijo-senpai... You have to clear your mind![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_222_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 232 0 0}Aigis is losing her cool... Stay with us![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_223_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 233 0 0}Amada-kun's losing it... You need to calm down![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_226_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 236 0 0}The enemy's taunting is making you angry...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_237_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 247 0 0}Thank goodness! Now it's time for a counterattack![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_238_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 248 0 0}Yukari-chan's back up! Time for some payback![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_242_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 252 0 0}Aigis is back up! Time to retaliate![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_244_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 254 0 0}Koro-chan's back at it! Make them pay![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_245_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 255 0 0}Aragaki-senpai's back on his feet! We're ready for a comeback![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_246_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 256 0 0}You're back in the fight! Now it's our turn![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_247_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 257 0 0}I think someone else could strike a weakness...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_247_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 258 0 0}Someone can target a weakness! Maybe try Shifting![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_247_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 259 0 0}Someone could hit a weakness. Try switching out![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_247_04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 260 0 0}If you Shift, you can target the enemy's weakness![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_247_05
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 261 0 0}With teamwork, you can hit the enemy's weakness![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_248_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 262 0 0}You're in bad shape! You need to recover before you get hit![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_248_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 263 0 0}Enemy attack imminent! You need to heal, quickly![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_248_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 264 0 0}You're really beat up! Hurry, you've got to heal![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_248_04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 265 0 0}Can you patch yourself up? The enemy's about to strike...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_248_05
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 266 0 0}The enemy's turn is coming up! Heal now while you still can...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_252_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 270 0 0}You can use your Theurgy! Go for it, Yukari-chan![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_254_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 272 0 0}You can use your Theurgy! Sanada-senpai, do it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_255_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 273 0 0}You can use your Theurgy! Go for it, Kirijo-senpai![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_259_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 277 0 0}You can use your Theurgy! Go ahead, Aragaki-senpai![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_260_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 278 0 0}Your Theurgy's ready and waiting! Go for it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_261_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 279 0 0}My Theurgy... I think I can use it now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_270_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 288 0 0}Aragaki-senpai's so serious... It's like the air is electrified...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_271_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 289 0 0}I'm reading your vitals! You're doing great![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_272_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 290 0 0}Our leader got the last hit! That about does it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_273_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 291 0 0}Yukari-chan's taken them out! Good work out there![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_274_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 292 0 0}Nice hit, Junpei-kun! That wraps it up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_277_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 295 0 0}Aigis has destroyed the enemy! Good work![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_278_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 296 0 0}Amada-kun took out the enemy! No targets remaining.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_280_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 298 0 0}Aragaki-senpai took out the enemy! We're all done here![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_281_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 299 0 0}I'm reading all targets eliminated! Great job![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_282_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 300 0 0}That power of yours was incredible, Leader![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_284_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 302 0 0}Junpei-kun wiped the enemy off the map![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_286_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 304 0 0}That was perfection! Impressive as always, Kirijo-senpai![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_287_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 305 0 0}All enemies eliminated! That was great, Aigis![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_288_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 306 0 0}The battle is over! Nice Theurgy, Amada-kun![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_289_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 307 0 0}Koro-chan took out the enemy! That was amazing![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_290_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 308 0 0}The enemy's finished! Way to go, Aragaki-senpai![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_291_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 309 0 0}So this is the power of Theurgy... No enemies remaining![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_292_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 310 0 0}Four targets eliminated! That was amazing, Leader![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_293_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 311 0 0}Four enemies taken out! You did it, Yukari-chan![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_294_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 312 0 0}That's four at once! Nice one, Junpei-kun![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_298_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 316 0 0}That's four taken out at once! Way to go, Amada-kun![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_300_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 318 0 0}That's four of them! Glad we could count on you, Aragaki-senpai![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_301_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 319 0 0}Wow! That took out four at once![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_303_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 321 0 0}Yukari-chan beat three of them at once![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_306_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 324 0 0}Kirijo-senpai wiped out three targets with that attack![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_311_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 329 0 0}That's three enemies taken out at once![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_312_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 330 0 0}Our leader's taken down two at once![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_313_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 331 0 0}Nice one, Yukari-chan! Two enemies taken out![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_317_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 335 0 0}You're doing great, Aigis! Two enemies defeated![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_318_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 336 0 0}You did it, Amada-kun! Two enemies in one go![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_319_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 337 0 0}Good one, Koro-chan! That took out two of them![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_320_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 338 0 0}You showed them, Aragaki-senpai! That's two for one![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_324_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 342 0 0}That's one fewer enemy! Keep it up, Junpei-kun![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_328_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 346 0 0}The enemy's been taken out! Great job, Amada-kun![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_333_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 351 0 0}They've all been knocked down! Way to go, Yukari-chan![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_334_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 352 0 0}All enemies down! You're on fire, Junpei-kun![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_339_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 357 0 0}They're all down! You did it, Koro-chan![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_341_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 359 0 0}Wow! You've knocked them out of formation![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_344_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 362 0 0}That's four down! Keep it up, Junpei-kun![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_346_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 364 0 0}Kirijo-senpai just knocked down four at once![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_348_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 366 0 0}That's four knockdowns! Amada-kun, keep it up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_349_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 367 0 0}Four enemies knocked down! You go, Koro-chan![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_362_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 380 0 0}Yes, you did it! Two enemies down![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_365_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 383 0 0}Sanada-senpai knocked down two with that attack![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_366_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 384 0 0}Kirijo-senpai's attack just knocked down two enemies![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_368_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 386 0 0}That's two of them knocked down! Keep it up, Amada-kun![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_384_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 402 0 0}That hit a weakness! You did it, Junpei-kun![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_385_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 403 0 0}You struck a weakness! Good one, Sanada-senpai![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_386_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 404 0 0}You hit a weakness! Great work as always, Kirijo-senpai![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_387_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 405 0 0}Direct hit on a weakness! Amazing, Aigis![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_388_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 406 0 0}You hit a weakness! Keep it up, Amada-kun![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_389_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 407 0 0}That hit a weakness! You're the best, Koro-chan![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_390_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 408 0 0}You hit a weakness! Well done, Aragaki-senpai![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_398_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 416 0 0}Great work, Amada-kun! That was right on target![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_399_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 417 0 0}Way to go, Koro-chan! That was a critical![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_403_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 421 0 0}Ah, that was so close! Next time, Yukari-chan![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_404_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 422 0 0}Junpei-kun... Um, you'll get it next time...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_406_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 424 0 0}Ah...! Don't let it get to you, Kirijo-senpai![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_407_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 425 0 0}The enemy evaded... Aigis, adjust your targeting![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_408_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 426 0 0}You almost had it, Amada-kun! Just focus![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_410_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 428 0 0}Missed...! It's okay, you've got this, Aragaki-senpai![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_411_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 429 0 0}Ah, so close...! You'll get it next time![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_418_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 436 0 0}Ah! Koro-chan, bad boy! Come back here![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_430_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 448 0 0}I'm reading your vitals! You're doing great![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_431_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 451 0 0}Remember, you can stop if things look bad...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_432_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 452 0 0}Yes! This is your chance for an All-Out Attack![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_432_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 453 0 0}Amazing! It's time for an All-Out Attack![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_432_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 454 0 0}The enemy lines are broken! Now's your chance![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_433_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 455 0 0}Everyone go for it! You've got this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_435_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 461 0 0}No good... It doesn't look like we can get out of this one...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_436_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 462 0 0}Sorry, I'm still searching for an escape route. Just hold on for a little longer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_437_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 463 0 0}There! You should be able to leave now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_438_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 464 0 0}Oh no... I couldn't find a way out...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_439_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 465 0 0}You can hit a weakness with this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_439_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 466 0 0}You have a skill that can hit a weakness![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_439_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 467 0 0}Looks like you can target a weakness![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_440_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 468 0 0}It doesn't look like you have the right skills...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_440_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 469 0 0}Looks like you can't hit any weaknesses...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_440_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 470 0 0}I don't think you have any skills for this...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_441_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 471 0 0}You might be able to hit a weakness if you Shift![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_441_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 472 0 0}Someone else could hit the enemy's weakness![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_441_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 473 0 0}Shift to swap out and hit the enemy's weakness![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_442_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 474 0 0}You have an attack that works well![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_442_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 476 0 0}Looks like you can deal effective damage.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_443_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 477 0 0}You can use your weapon to strike the enemy's weakness![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_443_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 478 0 0}You're in luck! The enemy's weak to your standard attack![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_443_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 479 0 0}The enemy seems to be weak to your weapon![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_444_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 481 0 0}You can deal good damage with weapon attacks.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_445_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 483 0 0}You have something that works, but there may be another weakness you can exploit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_445_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 484 0 0}You have something that works, but there may be another weakness you can exploit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_446_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 485 0 0}I haven't seen any weaknesses... You'll have to use trial and error.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_446_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 486 0 0}I don't know their weaknesses yet... Can you test something out?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_447_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 487 0 0}Try using an item to hit their weakness![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_447_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 488 0 0}Items can be a good way to strike weaknesses![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_447_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 489 0 0}Oh, I think you have an item that can target the enemy's weakness![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_448_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 490 0 0}All enemies defeated! Good work out there![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_448_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 491 0 0}That about does it! No Shadows detected![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_448_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 492 0 0}That's a win for the team! Good job, everyone![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_449_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 493 0 0}The enemy escaped. Looks like the fight's over.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_452_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 498 0 0}That's the third swap! You're synced up perfectly![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_452_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 499 0 0}And that's the whole team! Beautiful coordination![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_454_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 502 0 0}That's a strong one... Be on your guard![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_455_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 503 0 0}Nothing to be afraid of. Let's make this quick.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_456_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 504 0 0}This should be a good test of your strength... But don't get careless![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_457_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 505 0 0}It's weak to slashing! Swords will deal massive damage![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_458_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 506 0 0}Strike attacks are its weakness! Just try punching it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_459_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 507 0 0}It's weak to piercing! Try arrows or bullets![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_461_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 509 0 0}The enemy's weak to Ice. Let's freeze 'em solid![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_464_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 512 0 0}Looks like the enemy's weak to Light![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_466_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 514 0 0}Slashing won't work. Don't bother with swords.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_467_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 515 0 0}Strike attacks are no good here. Be careful.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_470_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 518 0 0}Ice doesn't seem to have any effect...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_471_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 519 0 0}Wind isn't good on this one. You'll have to try something else![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_472_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 520 0 0}Electricity's useless here... Keep that in mind![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_474_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 522 0 0}Darkness has no effect on this enemy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_475_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 523 0 0}The enemy's easily charmed! Do you have a skill for it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_476_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 524 0 0}It's susceptible to poison. See if you can take advantage of that![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_478_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 526 0 0}You might be able to confuse it... Want to give that a try?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_479_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 527 0 0}This enemy looks skittish. Think you can give it a scare?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_480_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 528 0 0}This one looks short-tempered. Maybe you can anger it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_485_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 543 0 0}My Theurgy needs a bit more time...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_486_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 546 0 0}Yes... My Theurgy will be ready soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_487_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 548 0 0}I'll be able to scan the enemy soon![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_488_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 550 0 0}I'm still setting up. It'll take a little more time...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_490_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 553 0 0}Ready to scan! Shall I get started?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_490_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 554 0 0}I can analyze now! Just say the word![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_492_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 558 0 0}I see... So this is what we're up against.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_494_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 560 0 0}Sorry... I don't have it in me to scan right now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_495_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 562 0 0}Now I can support you all even better![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_496_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 563 0 0}The enemy has a status ailment. This is our chance![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_496_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 564 0 0}The enemy's suffering a bit. We have the advantage![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_496_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 565 0 0}The enemy's weakened! Now let's take it down![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_530_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 597 0 0}I can start the analysis at any time![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_534_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 601 0 0}Hey, I can see the enemy's weakness now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_538_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 605 0 0}This large Shadow is of the Hierophant Arcana![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_539_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 606 0 0}We don't know what it'll do. Be ready for anything![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_543_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 610 0 0}This one's from the Lovers Arcana... It's the source of the mind manipulation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_550_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 617 0 0}They've separated again! But our damage is split equally between them![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_553_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 620 0 0}This large Shadow's Arcana is the Hermit. Watch out for attacks that use electricity![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_554_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 621 0 0}The enemy Shadow is charging up now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_555_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 622 0 0}We've stopped the enemy from powering up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_559_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 626 0 0}The Strength Arcana seems confident in its power. Don't be fooled by its appearance![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_561_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 628 0 0}I have a really bad feeling about this roulette board...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_566_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 633 0 0}The Shadow is back in the air! You can't attack it anymore![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_573_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 640 0 0}It doesn't matter how many times he changes Arcana... I'll scan him no matter what![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_574_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 641 0 0}I want to protect this world, and everyone in it... I know I can do it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_576_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 643 0 0}Nyx just changed to the Lovers type![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_585_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 652 0 0}These two are serious... But I know you can do this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_586_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 653 0 0}Please be careful! I sense an even greater power than before![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_587_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 654 0 0}Ah! Everyone has been struck by fear! I have a bad feeling about this! Please get up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_637_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 703 0 0}You dodged it! Way to go, Metis![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_641_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 707 0 0}Metis took major damage! She needs healing![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_643_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 709 0 0}Metis is shocked! It looks like she can't move...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_644_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 710 0 0}Metis is charmed... Someone snap her out of it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_645_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 711 0 0}Metis has been poisoned... Her health is dropping![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_646_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 712 0 0}Metis is distressed... Someone calm her down![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_647_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 713 0 0}Metis is confused. She's acting on her own![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_648_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 714 0 0}Metis is scared stiff! Someone help her![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_649_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 715 0 0}Metis looks really angry! C-Can someone calm her down...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_651_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 717 0 0}Metis is back up! What a relief![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_654_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 720 0 0}Metis finished off the enemy! Looks like we're done here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_655_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 721 0 0}Metis wiped them out in the blink of an eye![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_660_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 726 0 0}All targets are down! Great job, Metis![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_661_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 727 0 0}That's four enemies down! Good one, Metis![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_663_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 729 0 0}Two targets downed! Metis gave us an opening![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_665_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 731 0 0}Metis hit the enemy's weakness! You're doing great![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_667_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 733 0 0}Missed the target! Don't worry about it, Metis.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_670_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 736 0 0}No... It can't be! Aigis, wake up! Aigis![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_675_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 126 0 0}Aigis, your defense is low right now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_680_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 182 0 0}Aigis is charmed... She can't tell friend from foe...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_683_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 212 0 0}Aigis is confused! Just try and calm down...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_684_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 222 0 0}Aigis! Is she going to be okay like that...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_685_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 232 0 0}Aigis is losing her cool... Stay with us![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_687_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 252 0 0}Aigis is back up! Time to retaliate![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_690_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 295 0 0}Aigis has destroyed the enemy! Good work![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_691_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 305 0 0}All enemies eliminated! That was great, Aigis![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_694_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 335 0 0}You're doing great, Aigis! Two enemies defeated![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_701_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 405 0 0}Direct hit on a weakness! Amazing, Aigis![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_703_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 425 0 0}The enemy evaded... Aigis, adjust your targeting![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_06_706_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 736 0 0}No... It can't be! Aigis, wake up! Aigis![n]{f 1 1}
